news.paragraph: CrowdStrike was recently named Frost & Sullivan’s Company of the Year for its identity threat detection and response capabilities. However, traders should weigh this recognition against broader market concerns regarding an overextended AI rally and new competition in the software security space from OpenAI's Daybreak initiative.
headlines: OpenAI Launches Daybreak in Effort to Woo Pentagon Away From Mythos
Chip Stocks Have Been Crushing Software. Here’s How to Play Both.
